architecture_fit.note: Single attention layer, no MLP, minimal delta from base_model.py (one-hot bracket embed + partner-permutation QK + relative-pos bias); directly solves the constraint-propagation task at 20.6x random.

baseline_comparison.note: Full circuit (20.6x) contrasted against ablated pos-only (1.67x), nearest-neighbour strawman (1.96x), and uniform (1.0x) under identical conditions.

faithfulness.note: Hand-set weights let the bracket-match term be ablated directly (type_scale->0), collapsing fidelity to ~random — genuine causal evidence the type-match sub-circuit drives the behaviour.

operating_range.note: Distance sweep 1->16 shows graceful decay and seq_len 16->128 (8x) shows fidelity 7x->116x; relevant axes covered but seq_len span is under two orders of magnitude.

hardcoded_weights_bonus.note: Entire circuit is hand-set with no training — QK partner-permutation and per-head proximity bias written out by hand, reproducing the target behaviour.

visual_judgement.note: Four legible views: alignment-vs-distance lines per head, causal ablation bar, attention heatmap with ground-truth partner cells outlined, and fidelity-vs-seq_len range plot.

visualisation_rationale.note: README ties each chart to the goal question — distance axis for decay, causal bar for necessity, heatmap to see weight land on partners, log-log range plot for operating range.

notes: A clean hand-built single-layer attention circuit that propagates bracket constraints at 20.6x random, beating its own ablations and strawmen and demonstrating causal necessity of the type-match QK term. The hand-set weights earn the full bonus, and the four-view visualisation makes every claim legible. Operating range is solid on distance but only modest on seq_len, keeping the mean just under a perfect score.
